steps.title: Compare the ages
steps.content: The question asks for the youngest bear, so the relevant value is the smallest age in the table. The listed ages for the answer choices are 7, 6, 11, and 3 years.

steps.title: Pick the minimum value
steps.content: Choice A names a 7-year-old bear, Choice B a 6-year-old bear, and Choice C an 11-year-old bear. The remaining bear is 3 years old, the lowest age shown. The answer is D.
